decisions.greekBookPolicy: Do not patch Greek Daniel or Greek Esther by simple full-source overlay. Their DRB/NABRE source deltas include nontrivial versification and book-shape differences.
decisions.maccabeesPolicy: Do not treat active 3 Maccabees or 4 Maccabees as complete. Repo-history candidates inspected so far are either unparseable in current JSON inspection or identical to the active sparse files.
decisions.sourcePolicy: No direct full local source for 3 Maccabees or 4 Maccabees has been identified in this tranche.
decisions.trustPolicy: Deuterocanon remains not trusted/underbuilt even after DRB/NABRE completion tranches.

3maccabees.historyFinding: parseable historical active-path copy is identical to active sparse file; other inspected historical candidates were not parseable in current JSON inspection

4maccabees.historyFinding: parseable historical active-path copy is identical to active sparse file; other inspected historical candidates were not parseable in current JSON inspection
